/usr/bin/c++  -O0 -g3 -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/aethercli_tests.dir/tests/test_cliutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aethercli_tests.dir/tests/test_completer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aethercli_tests.dir/tests/test_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aethercli_tests.dir/tests/test_macro.cpp.o -o aethercli_tests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.a
